sourcesContent:
export const themes = {
  rose: {
    name: '柔雾蔷薇',
    bg: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-rose-50 via-pink-50 to-fuchsia-50',
    sidebar: 'bg-white/75 backdrop-blur-md border border-pink-100/60',
    avatarRing: 'ring-2 ring-rose-300/70 ring-offset-2',
    btn: 'bg-white/80 hover:bg-rose-50 text-rose-800 border border-rose-100/50 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDownloadNoAnswer: 'bg-rose-50/80 hover:bg-rose-100/80 text-rose-800 border border-rose-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDownloadWithAnswer: 'bg-fuchsia-50/80 hover:bg-fuchsia-100/80 text-fuchsia-800 border border-fuchsia-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDanger: 'bg-gray-50/80 hover:bg-red-50/80 text-red-400 border border-gray-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    sectionTitle: 'text-rose-500',
    textMuted: 'text-rose-400/70',
    userBubble: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-rose-300 to-pink-300 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(244,114,182,0.3)]',
    aiBubble: 'bg-white/85 border border-pink-100/50 text-gray-700 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]',
    input: 'border-pink-200 focus:ring-rose-300',
    sendBtn: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-rose-400 to-pink-400 hover:from-rose-500 hover:to-pink-500 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(244,114,182,0.3)]',
    themeDot: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-rose-300 to-pink-300',
  },
  aqua: {
    name: '晴空浅岚',
    bg: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-sky-50 via-cyan-50 to-blue-50',
    sidebar: 'bg-white/75 backdrop-blur-md border border-sky-100/60',
    avatarRing: 'ring-2 ring-sky-300/70 ring-offset-2',
    btn: 'bg-white/80 hover:bg-sky-50 text-sky-800 border border-sky-100/50 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDownloadNoAnswer: 'bg-sky-50/80 hover:bg-sky-100/80 text-sky-800 border border-sky-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDownloadWithAnswer: 'bg-cyan-50/80 hover:bg-cyan-100/80 text-cyan-800 border border-cyan-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDanger: 'bg-gray-50/80 hover:bg-red-50/80 text-red-400 border border-gray-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    sectionTitle: 'text-sky-500',
    textMuted: 'text-sky-400/70',
    userBubble: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-sky-300 to-cyan-300 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(56,189,248,0.3)]',
    aiBubble: 'bg-white/85 border border-sky-100/50 text-gray-700 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]',
    input: 'border-sky-200 focus:ring-sky-300',
    sendBtn: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-sky-400 to-cyan-400 hover:from-sky-500 hover:to-cyan-500 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(56,189,248,0.3)]',
    themeDot: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-sky-300 to-cyan-300',
  },
  warm: {
    name: '暖绒松茶',
    bg: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-50 via-orange-50 to-yellow-50',
    sidebar: 'bg-white/75 backdrop-blur-md border border-amber-100/60',
    avatarRing: 'ring-2 ring-amber-300/70 ring-offset-2',
    btn: 'bg-white/80 hover:bg-amber-50 text-amber-900 border border-amber-100/50 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDownloadNoAnswer: 'bg-amber-50/80 hover:bg-amber-100/80 text-amber-900 border border-amber-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDownloadWithAnswer: 'bg-orange-50/80 hover:bg-orange-100/80 text-orange-900 border border-orange-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDanger: 'bg-gray-50/80 hover:bg-red-50/80 text-red-400 border border-gray-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    sectionTitle: 'text-amber-600',
    textMuted: 'text-amber-500/70',
    userBubble: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-300 to-orange-300 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)]',
    aiBubble: 'bg-white/85 border border-amber-100/50 text-gray-700 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]',
    input: 'border-amber-200 focus:ring-amber-300',
    sendBtn: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-400 to-orange-400 hover:from-amber-500 hover:to-orange-500 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)]',
    themeDot: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-300 to-orange-300',
  },
};
